1#pragma once
2
3#include <format>
4
5namespace util {
6
7// Macro for clearly separating a debug impl from core.
8#ifdef NDEBUG
9#define DEBUG_TYPE(release_t, debug_t) release_t
10#define DEBUG(statement)
11#define NODEBUG(statement) statement
12#else
13#define DEBUG_TYPE(release_t, debug_t) debug_t
14#define DEBUG(statement) statement
15#define NODEBUG(statement)
16#endif // !NDEBUG
17
18namespace ansi {
19constexpr const char *blue = "\033[34m";
20constexpr const char *yellow = "\033[33m";
21constexpr const char *reset = "\033[0m";
22} // namespace ansi
23#if defined(__GNUC__) || defined(__clang__)
24#define ECS_TRAP() __builtin_trap()
25#elif defined(_MSC_VER)
26#define ECS_TRAP() __debugbreak()
27#else
28#define ECS_TRAP() std::abort()
29#endif
30
31#ifndef NDEBUG
32#define ECS_ASSERT(expr, fmt, ...) \
33 do { \
34 if (!(expr)) { \
35 auto msg = std::format(fmt __VA_OPT__(, ) __VA_ARGS__); \
36 std::fprintf(stderr, \
37 "\n\033[1;31m[ECS ASSERT]\033[0m\n" \
38 " Expr: %s\n" \
39 " File: %s:%d\n" \
40 " Func: %s\n" \
41 " Msg : %s\n\n", \
42 #expr, __FILE__, __LINE__, __func__, msg.c_str()); \
43 ECS_TRAP(); \
44 } \
45 } while (0)
46#else
47#define ECS_ASSERT(expr, fmt, ...) ((void)0)
48#endif
49} // namespace util
